{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/snow.png
|block_health=4
|tool=[[Shover]]
|rotation=stairs
}}

== Obtaining ==
Snow can be found in many cold-wet biomes.

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}

== History ==

* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Blocks]]
